case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. VS. YVONNE PAVLOUSKY K/N/A GUERRA

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. SERVED SEP-15-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YVONNE PAVLOUSKY K/N/A GUERRA PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON OCT-16-2013 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT YVONNE PAVLOUSKY K/N/A GUERRA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE: VENUE [C.C. SECTION 2984.4] FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORP.
